en: Yes. No, no, no. There is no problem. We're coming out right now.
Well, that was good. That was good. What did you... you pay some hotel desk clerk to make
that call for you? Is that what you did? Yes, Captain Luke. I've got one minute to bring you out.
Captain Luke! Captain Luke! Ooh, Captain Luke. Well, Carl, I gotta say, that sounds pretty
ko: 루크 대장! 루크 대장! 오, 루크 대장.

en: official to me, but like I said, I... I think it's just me and you here. It's me and you,
so you're gonna have to catch me. Frank! Frank! You have to trust me on this.
These people have been embarrassed, Frank. They're angry. You robbed their banks. You
ko: 이 사람들은 창피를 당했어요, 프랭크. 그들은 화가 나 있어요.

en: steal their money. You live in their country. I told you this was what was going to happen.
ko: 그들의 돈을 훔쳤고, 그들의 나라에 살고 있어요.

en: But there was no other way for it to end. Don't make a mistake.
That's good. That's good, Carl. You know, keep pushing that lie. Keep pushing it. Keep
pushing it. You walk out that door, they're gonna kill you.
ko: 그 문을 나가면, 널 죽일 거야.
